title: S9 1HW, Ron Hull Jnr. Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/KB3902KR/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Ronald Hull Jnr. Limited   Installation name: 8 Grange Mill Lane   Permit number: EPR/KB3902KR   "
